content: whisper.cpp with Metal acceleration on Apple Silicon achieves >15x real-time with base model (142MB) — 5 seconds of audio transcribed in under 1 second. Supports Metal, CoreML, and GGML quantization. WhisperKit (Argmax) is an alternative that schedules across ANE+GPU+CPU for additional acceleration. Native iOS apps like ScribeAI demonstrate fully on-device Whisper inference. Core loop tech is proven.
